title: Crude phobium emitter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''crude phobium emitter''' was a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] emitter matrix, crafted from [[Phobium]] and designed specifically for more aggressive [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] (likely making it well-suited for practitioners of the [[Form IV/Legends|fourth form]] of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]). A phobium emitter is heavier and more unwieldy than most [[disrupting emitter]]s, but arguably far more effective.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
